test.name: Bai 2.3 - Kiem Thu Gio Hang va Thanh Toan

test-method.name: cancelStep1
test-method.description: TC_CART_018: Cancel o Step 1 - quay lai cart

test-method.name: cancelStep2
test-method.description: TC_CART_019: Cancel o Step 2 - quay lai inventory

test-method.description: TC_CART_013: Checkout dien du thong tin - thanh cong

test-method.name: checkoutTrongFirstName
test-method.description: TC_CART_014: Checkout de trong First Name - bao loi

test-method.name: checkoutTrongLastName
test-method.description: TC_CART_015: Checkout de trong Last Name - bao loi

test-method.name: checkoutTrongPostalCode
test-method.description: TC_CART_016: Checkout de trong Postal Code - bao loi

test-method.name: checkoutTrongTatCa
test-method.description: TC_CART_017: Checkout de trong tat ca - bao loi

test-method.name: continueShopping
test-method.description: TC_CART_020: Continue Shopping tu gio hang - quay lai inventory

test-method.description: TC_CART_025: Kiem tra Shipping Info = Free Pony Express Delivery!

test-method.name: kiemTraTongTien
test-method.description: TC_CART_022: Kiem tra tong tien chinh xac (Item total, Tax 8%, Total)

test-method.description: TC_CART_023: Kiem tra tong tien voi tat ca 6 san pham

test-method.name: kiemTraVoiProblemUser
test-method.description: TC_CART_024: Dung problem_user - ghi nhan bug neu phat hien

test-method.description: TC_CART_021: Sau khi hoan thanh - gio hang reset ve 0

test-method.description: TC_CART_012: Sort Price high to low

test-method.name: sortGiaTangDan
test-method.description: TC_CART_011: Sort Price low to high

test-method.description: TC_CART_009: Sort Name A-Z

test-method.name: sortTenZA
test-method.description: TC_CART_010: Sort Name Z-A

test-method.name: them3SanPham
test-method.description: TC_CART_002: Them 3 san pham - badge = 3

test-method.name: themMotSanPham
test-method.description: TC_CART_001: Them 1 san pham - badge = 1

test-method.name: themNhieuSanPhamKiemTraDanhSach
test-method.description: TC_CART_005: Them nhieu san pham - kiem tra danh sach trong gio

test-method.name: themSanPhamTheoTenKiemTraGio
test-method.description: TC_CART_004: Them san pham theo ten va kiem tra trong gio

test-method.name: themTatCa6SanPham
test-method.description: TC_CART_003: Them tat ca 6 san pham - badge = 6

test-method.name: xoaHetKiemTraCheckoutButton
test-method.description: TC_CART_008: Xoa het - nut Checkout van hien thi

test-method.name: xoaHetSanPham
test-method.description: TC_CART_007: Xoa het san pham - gio trong

test-method.name: xoaMotSanPham
test-method.description: TC_CART_006: Xoa 1 san pham - badge giam
